top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(*) * 1.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM' AND Currency = 'EUR') / 
     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM')) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(*) * 1.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM' AND Currency = 'EUR') / 
     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM')) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageEUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'KAM';
